name: Cron Runner
tagline: Runs Telegram cron jobs from admin DB
description: Every 5 minutes reads enabled cron_jobs from 216labs.db, runs due handlers (daily digest, Happy Path summary, stubs), sends to Telegram, updates last_run_at.

env_vars.description: Cxc bot token for admin logging channel (get from server if not set)
Secret for admin 'Run now' trigger; set to a random string
cron-runner base URL for Run now (default http://cron-runner:3029)
